summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact shows all 16 listed refs are open pull requests, none are security-sensitive, low-signal closeout/fix/merge are disabled, and there is no shared canonical. Each PR is classified independently with non-mutating keep actions.

actions.reason: Draft maintainer PR with focused code changes and no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical; keep as an independent review item.

Draft maintainer hardening/bug-fix PR with no hydrated duplicate or closure target; keep independently.

Draft maintainer PR in a related schema-hardening area, but it has distinct files and behavior from the other inventory items.
Focused contributor bug fix with linked issue context, but this plan cannot merge or post-merge close; keep independently.

Focused draft maintainer PR in schema hardening; keep as independent review item.
